name: Sliced Beef with Sesame Seeds
recipeIngredient: 500 ml Bottle of Chinese spice sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade with Fen Chiew (or Kao Liang Chiew) and salt.
2. Add cinnamon powder and star anise powder to the marinade.
3. Marinate beef shin for 24 hours.
4. Cook the shin in boiling water for 10 minutes, then remove and set aside.
5. Simmer the beef in the spice sauce for 75 minutes. (Use bottled sauce if cooking at home.)
6. Remove, cool, and freeze the beef for easier slicing with a machine or knife.
7. Stir-fry sesame seeds in a dry wok until golden.
8. Thinly slice the frozen beef shin and deep-fry in hot oil over medium flame until crisp.
9. Melt sugar in 2 tsp water in another wok, add beef slices, and stir fry until no liquid remains.
10. Sprinkle sesame seeds and sesame oil over the slices while still hot. Gently mix and transfer to a serving dish.
